title: calamintha graveolens subsp. purpurascens
intro: Calamintha graveolens subsp. purpurascens, also known as Purple Calamint, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its compact growth habit and delicate purple flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Purple Calamint include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Purple Calamint can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies and holistic health practices.
